compiled_state.title: RED: Create redirect stub tests for old skill names
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create tests verifying old skill names redirect to /dso:onboarding.

### Tests in tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh:
- test_project_setup_redirects: plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md contains redirect guidance to /dso:onboarding
- test_dev_onboarding_redirects: plugins/dso/skills/dev-onboarding/SKILL.md contains redirect guidance to /dso:onboarding  
- test_design_onboarding_redirects: plugins/dso/skills/design-onboarding/SKILL.md contains redirect guidance to /dso:onboarding

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket reviewed. Task: create tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh with 3 test functions verifying old skill names redirect to /dso:onboarding or /dso:architect-foundation. Tests will be RED initially.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read existing test patterns from tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh and tests/lib/assert.sh. Pattern: source assert.sh, use _snapshot_fail + assert_eq + assert_pass_if_clean per test, call print_summary at end. Confirmed old skill directories exist: project-setup, dev-onboarding, design-onboarding — each has SKILL.md but none contain redirect content yet (they have full original content). Tests will be RED.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Created tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh with 3 test functions: test_project_setup_redirects, test_dev_onboarding_redirects, test_design_onboarding_redirects. Each test checks for redirect stub content (redirect/replaced/use/moved/deprecated keywords plus the target skill name). Tests will be RED because old SKILL.md files still have full original content.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: File made executable with chmod +x tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validated tests fail RED. Output: PASSED: 0  FAILED: 3. All 3 tests fail as expected: test_project_setup_redirects, test_dev_onboarding_redirects, test_design_onboarding_redirects. Initial grep pattern was too loose (matched incidental content in existing SKILL.md files); updated to require explicit redirect phrases like 'renamed to /dso:onboarding' that only appear in actual redirect stubs.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. File: tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh — executable (-rwxr-xr-x), 3 test functions (test_project_setup_redirects, test_dev_onboarding_redirects, test_design_onboarding_redirects), all 3 fail RED (PASSED: 0 FAILED: 3). grep -c 'test_' returns 18 >> 3 (acceptance criteria satisfied). No .test-index entry added per task instructions. No git commit/push/transition performed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created 3 RED redirect stub tests
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
